title: 120 Film -  Resource Pack for Mortuusars Exposure Mod
description: This is a retexture of the Colour Film and Black & White Film from Mortuusars Exposure Mod. It is inspired by Ilford and Kodak  120 film stocks.
body:
![An image showing two different textures of the films one with black and green the other with yellow blue and white on a pinkish backdrop next to a tlr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e849450e824946e592f70ec479595f29196f7a72.jpeg)![An image showing both of the retextures of the film one blue yellow and white the other grey and white](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409eadfb4ddcc1844ac95a4d6cd5ce768f8608c5_0.webp)This is a retexture of the Colour Film and Black & White Film from **[Mortuusars Exposure Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)**. Since the camera model in the exposure mod is a medium format camera, I wanted to have a more realistic texture for the film.

**Original Mod Creator** - [https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars)
---
**Exposure Mod** - [https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
---
